calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion for a deemed admitted order on the Requests for Admission it served on defendant Victor A. Gonzalez, Sr., attached as Exhibit A to the Agne Declaration, is granted. Gonzalez has not responded, making a deemed-admitted order mandatory. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subd. (c).) Sanctions are also mandatory. (Id.) The court orders Gonzalez to pay a nominal sanction of $15 to Wells Fargo within 30 days.

A proposed order has been submitted as directed in the court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
